prospect.name: Kevin Park
prospect.title: Head of Brand Trust and Protection

product_context.product_name: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
product_context.one_line_value: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP

raw_research.deep_research_paste: Kevin Park leads brand trust and protection at Cascade Commerce Group, reporting to Robert Kline. He manages the brand registry program, seller compliance, and proactive enforcement actions. He is building out automated detection capabilities and has been testing several third-party tools for counterfeit listing detection. He is also responsible for the brand partner relationships that depend on effective IP enforcement on the platform. He needs tools that can scale enforcement across 8,000+ sellers without proportional headcount growth.
raw_research.company_notes: Cascade Commerce Group operates an e-commerce marketplace platform serving 8,000+ third-party sellers across home goods, apparel, and consumer electronics. They host branded storefronts for 200+ consumer brands and have been expanding their own private label portfolio. They face growing counterfeiting and trademark infringement challenges on the platform from third-party sellers. They recently launched a brand registry program but lack automated tools for proactive detection and enforcement at scale.

offer_lock: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
cta_lock: Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?
